# USDT Quick Fix Desk

USDT Quick Fix Desk sells small static web fixes and a landing page kit for 5 USDT on Ethereum / ERC-20.

Canonical URLs:

- Home: https://eazyhood.github.io/cash-sprint-5-usdt-desk/
- Agent metadata: https://eazyhood.github.io/cash-sprint-5-usdt-desk/.well-known/agent.json
- Payment catalog: https://eazyhood.github.io/cash-sprint-5-usdt-desk/.well-known/x402.json
- Order issue: https://github.com/EazyHood/cash-sprint-5-usdt-desk/issues/new
- Product issue: https://github.com/EazyHood/cash-sprint-5-usdt-desk/issues/5

Payment:

- Minimum: 5 USDT
- Network: Ethereum mainnet / ERC-20
- USDT contract: 0xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7
- Wallet: 0x06f44f4839fd5df4f4670036d028b29dec939363

After payment, the buyer should open a GitHub issue with the transaction hash and the requested deliverable.
